data.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In Fidelity MSCI Energy Index ETF 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
data.description:
Fidelity MSCI Energy Index ETF (NYSE:FENY) has outperformed the market over the past 5 years by 8.52% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 19.69%. Currently, Fidelity MSCI Energy Index ETF has a market capitalization of $1.91 billion.

Buying $1000 In FENY: If an investor had bought $1000 of FENY stock 5 years ago, it would be worth $2,386.97 today based on a price of $31.15 for FENY at the time of writing.
